summary: Fixed CRITICAL path traversal vulnerability in download_export endpoint and added comprehensive Pydantic field-level validation (max_length + enum allowlist) across all request models in bulk_router.py.

issue_1_path_traversal.fix: Three-layer defence: (1) raw string check for '..', '/', '\\' before path construction; (2) extension allowlist restricted to .json/.csv/.sarif; (3) resolve()-based canonical path confinement check as defence-in-depth

issue_2_status_validation.fix: Added max_length=64 to new_status, max_length=1000 to reason, max_length=255 to changed_by. Added @field_validator('new_status') enforcing allowlist: {accepted_risk, closed, false_positive, in_progress, open, resolved, wont_fix}

issue_3_model_lengths.BulkCreateTicketsRequest: integration_id max_length=128, project_key max_length=128, issue_type max_length=64

changes_detail.import_added: field_validator added to pydantic import line
